name: Gitano Shigeo
description: Gitano Shigeo is a teenager was offered the parakeet in which Yuuichi Shibata's soul resided, but refused because it was cursed. He was saved from a enormous steel beam by Chad. He is later again seen with his friend Harutoki and Chad on their way to get someting to eat, he even goes to say that he'll die if he doesn't get anything to eat. He was again saved by Chad when they are suddenly attacked by a Hollow. He is usually seen carring a guitar case suggesting that he may be a musician.
